svg.text: Architecture A — React SPA + .NET 10 modular monolith · minikube on WSL2 · Phases 10b–10d as built + planned Redis cache · thesis benchmark platform (vs Architecture B, Go SSR)
mkcert CA in Windows cert store
same ingress path as real users
minikube cluster "forum" — WSL2 / Docker driver · CNI calico · addons: ingress, metrics-server · k8s API :8443
namespace: forum-dotnet — PSS restricted (enforce+warn+audit) · default-deny ingress · 5 tokenless ServiceAccounts
Service :3000 · pure CSR shell — browser calls /api itself
modular monolith — module = project + schema + exchange:
hosted: outbox relay ×4 · consumers · orphan sweep · WS feed
JWT 15m + refresh rotation (httpOnly) · Argon2id · SQL ACL
Serilog JSON→stdout · OTel traces→Tempo · trace exemplars
WS-ticket replay (cross-replica single-use) · shared rate-limit counters
optional hot-read cache — adopt only where k6 (9c) shows wins
bucket ensured by Job · CORS https://forum.local
presigned PUT/GET — bytes never touch backend
per-module EF chains + raw SQL: authz fns, FTS,
triggers, views — never at app startup (HPA race)
backend image, same git-SHA tag (apply-time sed)
5 tokenless ServiceAccounts — no Roles, automount off
namespace: monitoring — PSS privileged (enforce) · Helm ×5, charts pinned · ≈1 GiB RSS budget · Grafana exposed via ingress
local storage · TraceQL bursts can OOM 512Mi
node-exporter · kube-state-metrics — mon-check gates: all UP
trace-based exemplars → Tempo links · retention sized for runs
tails pod stdout via kubelet API (no hostPath)
ships lines whole → Loki · "| json" at query
minio.forum.local — presigned PUT / GET: file bytes bypass the backend (ADR 0008)
PSS restricted enforced in app ns (0 warnings) · monitoring privileged (node-exporter)
default-deny + 5 allow NetworkPolicies (calico) · egress open — documented decision
tokenless SAs · numeric non-root uids (1654/1000/999) · ro-rootfs · seccomp RuntimeDefault
TLS end-to-end (mkcert) · HttpOnly+Secure refresh cookie · Argon2id · JWT fail-fast
mgmt UIs (RabbitMQ :15672, MinIO :9001) never ingress-exposed — port-forward only
migrations as Job, never at startup (ADR 0005) · imagePullPolicy Never (local images)
mk-up → minikube: calico + ingress + metrics-server · mk-tls → mkcert SAN cert (once)
mk-deploy [--seed]: build 2 images (git-SHA) → minikube image load → secrets if-missing
→ infra (PG/MQ/MinIO) → Jobs: bucket · migrate · seed → backend → frontend → ingress → netpols
mon-up: helm ×5 pinned + dashboard CMs + rules · mon-check: every scrape target UP
rollback: kubectl rollout undo (SHA-addressed history) · reset-db.sh · seed --benchmark
load: scripts/run-load-test.sh (k6) — Phase 9c measured runs vs forum_net_bench
minikube ip UNREACHABLE from Windows — everything rides WSL2 localhost forwarding
ingress on real 443/80 (sysctl ip_unprivileged_port_start=80) · hosts file → 127.0.0.1
mkcert CA imported into the Windows cert store (browser trust)
make tunnels — local = remote + 10000, auto-reconnect, Ctrl+C stops all:
backend 18080 · postgres 15432 · rabbit UI 25672 · minio console 19001
grafana 13001 · prometheus 19090 — API-server path, immune to netpol
forum-dotnet — Architecture A (React SPA + .NET 10 modular monolith) · target-state Kubernetes deployment · docs/architecture/diagrams/ · 2026-07
